Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Teminating, Issue, And Evidentiary Sanctions Based On Spoliation Of Evidence
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Erica J. Kelly, Esq. of Wilson Elser etal, Tel. 415.433.0990, appearing for defendant and moving party via court call;
Mark Fong, Esq. of Minami Tamaki LLP, Tel. 415.788.9000, appearing for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After hearing, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HWA 555 OWNERS LLC, VORNADO REALTY TRUST Motion For TeRminating, Issue, and Evidentiary Sanctions Based On Spoliation Of Evidence is denied for reasons stated on the record. Order signed in open Court. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
